How active are you?
This helps us calculate your daily energy expenditure accurately.
🪑
Sedentary
Little or no exercise, desk job
🚶
Lightly Active
Light exercise 1-3 days/week
🏋️
Moderately Active
Moderate exercise 3-5 days/week
🔥
Very Active
Hard training 6-7 days/week
⚡
Extra Active
Twice daily training or physical job
What's your main goal?
We'll tailor your macros and calorie targets to match.
🔻
Cut
Lose fat, reveal muscle
⚖️
Maintain
Stay lean, perform well
📈
Bulk
Build muscle & strength
Body composition
Optional — helps refine your targets using lean body mass.

Based on your body data & goal. Every macro is fully adjustable.

🏋️ Squad Workout Plans
ℹ️ These don't replace your personal program. Tapping a plan creates a shared Challenge for your squad — everyone competes to log the most sessions. Your own active program and workouts stay completely untouched.

Changes apply from today — all past days are permanently preserved
🔒
Your history is safe. Saving new targets creates a snapshot starting today. All previous days — calories, adherence, reports — stay exactly as they were. Nothing is retroactively changed.
